title: [DRAFT][NON-CLAIMING] VITA adapter: verify gate + benchmark scaffold
body:
NON-CLAIMING DRAFT — NOT BENCHMARK-READY

This PR is intentionally scoped to packaging safety + benchmark scaffolding.
It does NOT include a real parameter-golf benchmark execution and must not be interpreted as leaderboard readiness.

What is included:
- strict --verify-only anti-drift gate in adapters/vita/build_submission.py
- benchmark scaffold docs/scripts under adapters/vita/benchmark/

What is NOT included:
- executed benchmark pipeline evidence under challenge-like conditions
- benchmark metric claim from real parameter-golf run
- leaderboard/SOTA claim

Merge policy:
- keep as draft/non-claiming until real benchmark evidence exists (train/eval logs, metric extraction, artifact-size verification, comparability statement).

Validation performed (scaffold only):
- py_compile checks for scaffold scripts
- verify-only pass/fail gating behavior confirmed

comments.body:
Update: command templates added, still explicitly NON-CLAIMING.

What was added:
- adapters/vita/benchmark/runs/090-c2-benchmark-attempt-01/benchmark_commands.sh now includes:
  - local-smoke path template (sanity-only)
  - target-gpu benchmark path template (non-executing runbook)
  - explicit no-claim language and evidence-path requirements

Important:
- No benchmark claim added
- No challenge-equivalent metric claim added
- PR remains draft until real benchmark evidence exists
